texto: It is not what a man gets, But what a man is,That he should think of.He should first think of his character,And then of his condition.He that has character need have no fear of his condition.Character will draw condition after it.
explicacao: Orientação direta de H.W. Beecher (1813-1887) sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. A afirmação “It is not what a man gets, But what a man is,That he should think of.He should first think of his…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, character, condition, útil em momentos de reflexao.
